title: The Alchemist resolve Alchemist D6 table

card.rawText: During your turn, roll 1 die. If the result is: 1-2: Heal this creature 5 HP. 3-4: Inflict 10 damage to opponent's creature. 5-6: Inflict 5 damage to this card.

effect.value: D6: 1-2 heal self 5; 3-4 deal 10 to opponent; 5-6 deal 5 to self
